# Image Pack — QuillStack Systems (l-software-v01)

Synthetic images for IKAM multimodal benchmarks.

## Folders
- `logos/` — logo explorations
- `people/` — synthetic staff headshots
- `product-ui/` — synthetic UI screenshots
- `diagrams/` — architecture/incident/KPI diagrams
- `social/` — launch/hiring templates

## Metadata
- `prompts.jsonl` (JSON per line)

Required keys: id, out_path, kind, prompt, negative_prompt, model, checkpoint, sampler, steps, guidance, width, height, seed, created_at
Optional: style_tags, notes, source_case_id

## Style
- Vibe: modern B2B SaaS.
- Palette: dark navy + violet accent + off-white.

## Safety
- No real company names/logos.
- Avoid realistic personal data in UI.
